data.name: Pretty Dancer
data.detailed_description:
The heroine is a girl who loves dancing. Because of her father's debt problems, she was controlled by the mob by dancing for guests at a nightclub. To prevent her from escaping, sometimes evil gang leaders would tie her up with ropes. The player is required to help her through various dance challenges through the keyboard, and finally free herself from the rope and the gang's control.
· This is a casual game simulating dancing.
· The player completes the dance by quickly pressing the directional button as prompted.
· Sexy and beautiful character modeling.
· Colorful dance scenes.
· Real and smooth dance movements.
· Intense music and dance music.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
